dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6460 RH: Recreational Drone Empowerment Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Mann (for himself and Ms. Davids of Kansas) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure
Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed

form.official-title: To amend title 49, United States Code, to clarify exceptions for limited recreational operations of unmanned aircraft, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Recreational Drone Empowerment Act.

section.header: Clarifying recreational operations of drone systems
section.text: Section 44809(c)(2)(C) of title 49, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in the heading by inserting and Class E after Uncontrolled; and
by inserting , Class E airspace above Class G airspace, or a Class E airspace designated as an extension to a Class B, Class C, Class D, or Class E surface area after Class G airspace.

endorsement.action-desc: Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed
